# Sk8r Punk™

> Sk8r Punk™ is an electric skateboard cyberpunk universe spanning games, lore, factions, riders, and fiction.

## Canonical URL
- https://sk8rpunk.com/

## Public pages
- https://sk8rpunk.com/ — official hub for the Sk8r Punk™ universe, with lore, factions, project summaries, and the main call to action.

## Live game
- Punch Skater™ — https://punchskater.com/ — the first live game in the Sk8r Punk™ universe. Players build a crew of electric-skateboard riders, forge cards, run missions, and compete.

## Key topics
- electric skateboard cyberpunk
- cyberpunk Australia
- skate crews and factions
- Punch Skater™
- Operation Nightshade
- lore, fiction, and canon

## Access restrictions
- https://sk8rpunk.com/?page=bios is access-restricted and should not be indexed.
